name: @types/diff
usage_summary: The underlying 'diff' package (v5.2.2) is used in three source files. Two files in cli-kit (src/private/node/content-tokens.ts and src/public/node/output.ts) import only the 'Change' type via 'import type {Change} from "diff"'. One file in app (src/cli/services/app/env/pull.ts) imports the runtime function 'diffLines' from 'diff'. The diff package (v5.x) does NOT ship bundled TypeScript declarations (no 'types' or 'typings' field in its package.json), so @types/diff is required for all three import sites.
how_to_remove: Cannot remove — @types/diff is actively needed because diff@5.x ships no bundled types. Removal would break type-checking in cli-kit/src/private/node/content-tokens.ts, cli-kit/src/public/node/output.ts, and app/src/cli/services/app/env/pull.ts. The only alternative is to migrate from 'diff' to a TypeScript-native library (e.g. 'diff-match-patch' or 'fast-diff' with bundled types), which is a medium-size refactor.
replacement_reason: diff@5.x has no bundled types; @types/diff is necessary for type-safe use of Change and diffLines across two packages.
